refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for the load→travel→dump cycle by optimizing load handling, travel efficiency, and dump operations.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and high-level. Decomposing it into sub-functions targeting each phase of the cycle (load, travel, dump) allows focused design parameters and clearer verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure cycle time p95 under representative duty cycles and site conditions, verifying each sub-function's contribution to overall cycle time.

candidate_dps: Optimized travel path planning and control
selected_dp.selected_dp: Automated load handling system; Optimized travel path planning and control; Efficient dump mechanism control

potential_sources: Load handling affects travel start time
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically decoupled by cycle phase but require coordination at cycle boundaries; manageable coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate site and duty cycle data for optimization
Risk of suboptimal coordination causing cycle time delays
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit coordination DP or interface to manage phase transitions.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for cycle time performance including load, travel, and dump operations

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Used for real-time monitoring and feedback of cycle phases

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives operational commands and cycle targets

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends alerts if cycle time optimization conflicts with safety constraints

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary owner of cycle time optimization logic and coordination
Executes physical load, travel, dump operations but logic centralized in NGHE Solution
Supports remote control but not primary for cycle time optimization
Monitors safety but does not control cycle time

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing cycle time optimization DP in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and maximizes containment.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module due to broad scope
Coordination with Vehicle module must be tightly managed
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interfaces and responsibilities between NGHE Solution and Vehicle modules to reduce integration risks.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR decomposition into load, travel, dump sub-functions aligns well with selected DPs targeting each phase.

diffusion_risks: Risk of logic diffusion if Vehicle module takes over some optimization logic
Need to avoid duplication of cycle time logic across modules
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: NGHE Solution module has high containment score, indicating good packaging of DP.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry and tasking interfaces is feasible; safety alerts provide additional monitoring.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear ownership of cycle time optimization in NGHE Solution module.

recommended_revisions: Add explicit coordination DP/interface for phase transitions
Clarify Vehicle module role in executing DP commands
Strengthen interface definitions between NGHE Solution and Vehicle

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignments meet the requirements with manageable risks and clear ownership. Verification approaches are defined and interfaces are known.

revise.why: To add explicit coordination DP/interface managing transitions between cycle phases.

assumptions: Site and duty cycle data are accurate and available
Safety constraints are enforced by Safety Services module
open_risks: Coordination complexity between NGHE Solution and Vehicle modules
evidence_needed: Telemetry data demonstrating cycle time improvements
Interface test results between NGHE Solution and Vehicle
